kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Aldric, Cedric, and Rowan go with Highrow, Kingsford, and 13 coins, in some order.
Aldric's levy is higher than both the Blacksmith and the artisan in Riverside.
15 coins goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Blacksmith, and Bridgegate.
Wulfric goes with exactly one of Highrow, Southgate, or 7 coins.
Cedric's levy is lower than both the Carpenter and the artisan in Riverside.
The Weaver and the Cooper are in the same ward.
Either Cedric goes with Potter or someone in the South Side goes with Aldric.
Riverside goes with exactly two of Cedric, Potter, and 11 coins.
Either Aldric belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild or both members of the Hill Ward belong to the Ironmongers' Guild (but not both).
Cooper, Potter, and 13 coins go with Bridgegate, Eastcheap, and Riverside, in some order.
At least one of (the members of the Ironmongers' Guild and Rowan) belongs to the Gate Ward.
Exactly one of these is true: Godfrey goes with Potter; Weaver goes with 7 coins; Highrow goes with 17 coins.
